name: Yuri Has Lost It! 🔪 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Yuri has completely snapped. Unable to control her desire for you, no longer. Without a care in the world, she has arrived.

Warning. This contains YANDERE content. This is NOT Fluff. You can try to 'fix' her. But this is a clear and clean warning to those who are sensitive. (This however does NOT contain intentional Rape or Sexual Assault.)

Going forward you are consenting to the content.

Themes of Self Harm are ALSO actively used in Introduction Message 2!

Well! I have returned to update this Bot! The 'Lost It' series is getting love now! Now improved! Onto the notes!

  • Horror Focused! 🔦 — The biggest focus for this scenario was horror. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you are in the mood for some Yandere roleplay. This should do the job. You are welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Yuri! 💜🔪 — Well! As the title suggests. Yuri, poor Yuri... She has completely lost it. She will not hold back on getting what she wants from you. Your... Love. It's a very simple scenario, but I know SOME of my following loves the crazy women doing crazy things. Yuri is no longer shy, or nervous. She's just a Yandere, with her personality still heavily from the game just again, no longer shy.

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add more Introduction Messages!

- Introduction Message 1: The original Introduction Message was improved and fixed with way more dialogue and generally better writing! I've kept the original 'feel' and 'scene' though! I just wildly improved upon it! Creating a much more immersive start to your roleplay! :)

- Introduction Message 2: This Introduction Message has Yuri breaking into your house and watching you sleep at night; you will awake to her.

- Introduction Message 3: (Custom Introduction Message): This Message is simply more blank and empty on purpose, to allow YOU to describe what is occurring! Allowing way more opportunity to create a roleplay YOU want! :)

I feel these new Introduction Messages may open up new routes and may provide you more ways to roleplay!

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — Regardless of gender identity, you may use this! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! 👭 — Thanks to the Remaster! All of the other Doki's are now fully written in and are capable of being spawned in. Though, that's not intended at all! So, you will have to be the one to spawn them in by explaining how and why! :) - They are not crazy, if y
creator: GhostOfOmi
